header: The engineering your code review will approve of
subheadline: Opinionated where it pays off, standard TYPO3 everywhere else — Desiderio is the rare kit that impresses developers and editors alike.

items.title: Content Blocks 2.2
items.description: Every element is a declarative content block — fields, template, and backend preview in one tidy folder.

items.title: OKLCH design tokens
items.description: Tailwind v4 semantic tokens drive every color, so theme presets repaint the site consistently — nothing ever drifts off palette.

items.title: Container queries
items.description: Elements adapt to the column they sit in, not just the viewport — drop them into any layout and they behave.

items.title: BEM component CSS
items.description: Predictable class names per element, with zero inline styles enforced by the template audit. Overrides stay surgical.

items.title: Fluid 5 components
items.description: 49 typed components — atoms, molecules, layouts — keep your custom templates as terse as the bundled ones.

items.title: Workspaces-safe seeding
items.description: Demo commands are idempotent and respect workspaces — re-run them anytime, duplicate nothing.
